name: aaja-live
description: Production-ready anonymous real-time video chat platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run --workspace client dev" "npm run --workspace server dev"
scripts.build: npm run --workspace client build && npm run --workspace server build
scripts.test: npm run --workspace client test && npm run --workspace server test
scripts.lint: npm run --workspace client lint && npm run --workspace server lint
scripts.type-check: npm run --workspace client type-check && npm run --workspace server type-check
